description: A demo fractional asset referencing short-duration U.S. Treasury bill exposure for accounts that prioritize low-volatility yield. Disclosures emphasize transparent maturity cadence, stable settlement rhythm, and contract-sourced state on Arc testnet.

docs.label: Offering memorandum
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Summarizes share structure, tenor, and yield methodology.

docs.label: Custody statement
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Illustrates the custody narrative and valuation assumptions for the referenced bills.

docs.label: Risk disclosure
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Lists interest-rate, liquidity, and settlement risks for demo review.
